target: Verify seed data fixes for Grammar Game fill_blank, exit_ticket grammar question, cumulative-vocab API, and two PDF buttons in Lesson Summary
summary: All features verified working. 1) Cumulative vocab API returns correct lesson count and unique words. 2) Fill_blank sentences now use word's own example (e.g., 'My ______ is Sara.' correct='name', NOT 'What is your ______?' correct='boy'). 3) Exit ticket grammar Q3 uses correct word from pattern example. 4) Two PDF download buttons ('This Lesson' and 'All Lessons (Cumulative)') visible in Lesson Summary. 5) Roadmap displays 6 steps with winding path. 6) Warmup shows image_emoji above questions.

P0_cumulative_vocab_api.description: GET /api/unified/cumulative-vocab/stage_1_unit_03_lesson_01 returns vocabulary from all 9 lessons
P0_cumulative_vocab_api.evidence: API returns total_lessons=9, words=15 unique words, grammar_rules=5 patterns

P0_fill_blank_pedagogically_correct.description: fill_blank_items use word's own example sentence, NOT grammar pattern blindly filled
P0_fill_blank_pedagogically_correct.evidence: API returns: 'My ______ is Sara.' correct='name', 'She is my ______.' correct='friend', 'The ______ is happy.' correct='boy'
P0_fill_blank_pedagogically_correct.code_location: /app/backend/seed_stage1_full.py lines 868-880 - uses w.get('example') for fill_blank sentence

P0_exit_ticket_grammar_correct.description: Exit ticket Q3 grammar question finds correct word from rule's example sentence
P0_exit_ticket_grammar_correct.evidence: Exit ticket Q3: 'Complete: What is your ______' → correct='name' (found from 'My name is Sara.')
P0_exit_ticket_grammar_correct.code_location: /app/backend/seed_stage1_full.py lines 990-1017 - searches word appearing in example

P1_two_pdf_buttons.description: Lesson Summary shows two PDF download buttons

P1_grammar_game_word_order_normalization.description: Build the Sentence normalizes punctuation for comparison
P1_grammar_game_word_order_normalization.evidence: Code at lines 825-833 - normalize() strips trailing [.!?,;:] before comparing user answer to correct_sentence

P1_fill_blank_case_insensitive.description: Fill in the Blank comparison is case-insensitive
P1_fill_blank_case_insensitive.evidence: handleFillBlank uses .toLowerCase().trim() on both option and correct_answer

P2_lesson_roadmap.description: Roadmap displays 6 steps with winding path on lesson entry
P2_lesson_roadmap.evidence: Playwright found 6 roadmap steps and 'Start Lesson' button

P2_warmup_image_emoji.description: Warmup questions display image_emoji above question text
P2_warmup_image_emoji.evidence: Found emoji '1️⃣' in .text-5xl container above 'What does the number 1 mean?'

api_test_results.word_order_items_structure: PASS - words match correct_sentence after normalization

critical_code_review_comments: Seed data fix correctly uses word['example'] for fill_blank sentences instead of grammar pattern
Exit ticket grammar question correctly finds word that appears in rule['examples'][0]
Cumulative vocab API correctly parses lesson_id format and fetches all prior lessons
Two PDF buttons properly call generatePDF('current') and generatePDF('cumulative')
Client-side jsPDF generation works for both modes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 47 features verified. Cumulative vocab API works. Fill_blank uses word's example sentence. Exit ticket grammar Q3 is pedagogically correct. Two PDF download buttons in Lesson Summary. Grammar Game normalization and case-insensitivity working. Roadmap shows 6 steps. Warmup displays emoji.

mocked_api.pdf_generation: Client-side jsPDF - no backend API needed
